creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #26)

That would be so awesome, thanking you very much.

(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #27)

I am still confused, because the MOVED entry did not point to the flavourised -qt5 Port:

>  www/qutebrowser||2023-09-05|Flavorize, use qutebrowser@qt5 (default), or www/qutebrowser@qt6

The second column between the two |'s is empty.

Regardless, thanks for your help.
